evals.prompt: Give me today's AI and tech news digest — fetch from the usual sources and generate the interactive HTML page.
evals.expected_output: An HTML file saved to ~/Desktop/news-digest/YYYY-MM-DD.html with interactive digest including stats dashboard, daily keywords, collapsible sections (Highlights, US News, China News, GitHub Trending, HuggingFace Trending, arXiv), and color-coded keyword pills. Every item has a bilingual title (English + Chinese), 3-5 keywords with domain assignments, a 1-2 sentence summary, and a verified source link.
expectations: HTML file exists at ~/Desktop/news-digest/YYYY-MM-DD.html
Processed JSON saved before HTML generation
Total items capped at 40
Highlights has at most 10 items
Every item has title_zh (Chinese translation)
Every item has keywords with domain assignments
Every item has a source URL
Sources section at bottom lists all origin URLs
No fabricated content

evals.prompt: I need a digest that includes Chinese tech news from 36kr and Huxiu. Keep the Chinese content in the original language — don't translate the summaries. But make all titles bilingual.
evals.expected_output: An HTML digest where Chinese content items have bilingual titles (English / 中文), summaries in original Chinese, and Chinese keywords. English items also get Chinese translations of their titles.
expectations: Chinese items have bilingual titles (English / 中文)
Chinese content summaries are in original Chinese (not translated to English)
Chinese keywords use Chinese text (e.g. 大模型 not llm for ZH items)
English items have title_zh with Chinese translation
HTML renders both languages correctly

evals.prompt: Give me a tech news digest, but exclude any crypto or blockchain speculation. Also, if there's no genuinely major news today (new model releases, major acquisitions, scandals, etc.), don't include a Highlights section. Don't fabricate items to fill space. Cap at 40 total.
evals.expected_output: An HTML digest with no cryptocurrency/DeFi/NFT items. The Highlights section is either omitted entirely (if no qualifying major news) or contains only truly significant items. Total items capped at 40, with no fabricated entries.
expectations: No cryptocurrency, DeFi, or NFT items in output
Highlights section exists only if qualifying major news is present
Highlights items are genuinely significant (model releases, major product launches, scandals, $1B+ deals)
Total items is at most 40
No fabricated items — sparse sources result in fewer items, not invented ones
All links verified (link_verified: true for every item)

evals.prompt: Give me a weekly digest of AI and tech news for the week of July 4, 2026 — fetch from all sources and generate the interactive HTML page. Capped at 45 items, Mon-Sun week. Use existing daily data for any days already fetched.
evals.expected_output: An HTML file saved to ~/Desktop/news-digest/2026-06-29-W27-week.html (Monday of the week containing July 4, 2026) with at most 45 items covering the full Mon-Sun week. Deduplicated across all 7 days.
expectations: Weekly digest covers Mon-Sun calendar week containing 2026-07-04
Cap at most 45 items
Filename format is YYYY-MM-DD-WNN-week.html with Monday date and ISO week number
No duplicate items across days (URL dedup across all 7 days)
All items have bilingual titles and domain-tagged keywords
Existing daily raw.json files are reused where available (cache reuse)
